scripts.build:vite: npm run vite:sync && vite build && node tools/postbuild-vite.cjs
scripts.verify: npm run audit:project && npm test && npm run test:python && npm run build:vite
scripts.verify:legacy: npm run audit:project && npm test && npm run test:python && npm run build:legacy
scripts.deploy: npm run build:vite && wrangler deploy -c dist-vite/wrangler.json
